summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard without planning GitHub mutations. No shared canonical was chosen because the job is an inventory shard. No security-sensitive refs were detected. Close, merge, fix, raise_pr, instant close, and low-signal close paths are unavailable or disabled, so useful or active PRs are kept open or routed to exact maintainer decisions.
